sections.title: Part 2: Question-Response
sections.description: Listen to a question and 3 possible responses. Choose the best response.

questions.text: What qualifications are needed for the senior analyst position?
questions.explanation: Câu hỏi "What qualifications" yêu cầu bằng cấp/kinh nghiệm.

questions.text: When will the quarterly earnings report be released?
questions.explanation: Câu hỏi "When" yêu cầu thời gian.

questions.text: How do I apply for the employee discount program?
questions.explanation: Câu hỏi "How" yêu cầu phương pháp.

questions.text: Who oversees the compliance department?
questions.explanation: Câu hỏi "Who" yêu cầu người.

questions.text: Where can I find the employee handbook?
questions.explanation: Câu hỏi "Where" yêu cầu nơi chốn.

questions.text: Did the board approve the merger?
questions.explanation: Đáp án B xác nhận hội đồng đã phê duyệt sáp nhập.

questions.text: What prompted the change in company policy?
questions.explanation: Đáp án A giải thích lý do thay đổi chính sách.

questions.text: How many delegates are expected at the conference?
questions.explanation: Câu hỏi "How many" yêu cầu số lượng.

questions.text: Which department handles international shipping?
questions.explanation: Câu hỏi "Which department" yêu cầu bộ phận.

questions.text: Could you clarify the reimbursement process?
questions.explanation: Đáp án B giải thích quy trình hoàn tiền.

questions.text: Will the company be attending the trade show in Berlin?
questions.explanation: Đáp án B xác nhận công ty sẽ tham dự.

questions.text: What are the main deliverables for this project?
questions.explanation: Câu hỏi "What" yêu cầu sản phẩm cần bàn giao.

questions.text: Where should I park when visiting the downtown office?
questions.explanation: Đáp án B hướng dẫn nơi đỗ xe.

questions.text: How long is the probationary period for new managers?
questions.explanation: Câu hỏi "How long" yêu cầu thời gian.

questions.text: Do we have exclusivity rights for this product in the region?
questions.explanation: Đáp án B xác nhận có quyền phân phối độc quyền.

questions.text: Why was the marketing campaign postponed?
questions.explanation: Câu hỏi "Why" yêu cầu lý do. Đáp án A giải thích nguyên nhân.

questions.text: What is the turnaround time for the audit report?
questions.explanation: Câu hỏi yêu cầu thời gian xử lý.

questions.text: Can you brief me on the status of the Henderson account?
questions.explanation: Đáp án B cập nhật tình trạng tài khoản Henderson.

questions.text: Who should coordinate the press release?
questions.explanation: Câu hỏi "Who" yêu cầu người phụ trách.

questions.text: Where are the expense receipts stored after processing?
questions.explanation: Câu hỏi "Where" yêu cầu nơi lưu trữ.

questions.text: How does the company determine employee bonuses?
questions.explanation: Đáp án B giải thích cách tính thưởng.

questions.text: When is the deadline for submitting the annual budget?
questions.explanation: Câu hỏi "When" yêu cầu hạn chót.

questions.text: What security measures are in place for remote access?
questions.explanation: Đáp án B liệt kê các biện pháp bảo mật.

questions.text: Has the new ERP system been fully implemented?
questions.explanation: Đáp án B xác nhận hệ thống ERP đã được triển khai đầy đủ.

questions.text: Which vendors are approved for the procurement list?
questions.explanation: Đáp án B cho biết chỉ nhà cung cấp trong danh sách được phê duyệt.

sections.title: Part 3: Conversations
sections.description: Listen to a conversation and answer 3 questions.

questions.text: What is the man reviewing?
questions.explanation:
[Transcript]
Man: I've reviewed the quarterly financial report, and there are some discrepancies in the operating expenses.
Woman: Where did you find the issues?
Man: The travel expenses for the sales team seem inflated compared to last quarter.
Woman: Let me cross-reference with the receipts. I may have miscategorized some entries.

Ông ấy đang xem xét báo cáo tài trợ quý.

questions.text: Which expenses seem inflated?
options: C. Travel expenses for the sales team
questions.explanation:
[Transcript]
Man: I've reviewed the quarterly financial report, and there are some discrepancies in the operating expenses.
Woman: Where did you find the issues?
Man: The travel expenses for the sales team seem inflated compared to last quarter.
Woman: Let me cross-reference with the receipts. I may have miscategorized some entries.

Chi phí đi lại của đội bán hàng có vẻ cao bất thường.

questions.text: What did the man compare?
options: C. Last year's budget vs. this year's
questions.explanation:
[Transcript]
Woman: Have you had a chance to look at the new vendor proposal?
Man: Yes, I compared their pricing with three other suppliers.
Woman: And?
Man: Their unit cost is 12% lower, but the lead time is longer. We need to weigh the trade-off.

Ông ấy so sánh giá từ bốn nhà cung cấp.

Woman: And?
Man: Their unit cost is 12% lower, but the lead time is longer. We need to weigh the trade-off.

Đơn giá thấp hơn 12%.

Nhược điểm là thời gian giao hàng lâu hơn.

questions.text: What does the client want?
options: B. Lower pricing and expanded services
questions.explanation:
[Transcript]
Man: The client wants to renegotiate the terms of our service agreement.
Woman: What specific changes are they requesting?
Man: They want a 10% reduction in pricing and an expanded scope of services.
Woman: That's going to affect our margins significantly. We should prepare a counter-offer.

Khách hàng muốn giảm giá 10% và mở rộng phạm vi dịch vụ.

questions.text: What is the woman concerned about?
options: B. The impact on profit margins
questions.explanation:

questions.explanation:

Woman: I noticed our website bounce rate has increased significantly this month.
Man: By how much?

Man: That's alarming. Let's check if the site speed has degraded or if there's an issue with the landing page.

sections.title: Part 4: Short Talks
sections.description: Listen to a short talk and answer questions.

questions.text: What was the company recognized for?
questions.explanation:
[Transcript]
Good afternoon, employees. I'm pleased to announce that our company has been named one of the Top 50 Employers in the country by Business Weekly magazine. This recognition reflects our commitment to fostering a positive workplace culture, offering competitive benefits, and investing in employee development. Congratulations to all of you for making this possible.

Công ty được công nhận là một trong những nhà tuyển dụng hàng đầu.

questions.text: Who gave the company this recognition?
questions.explanation:

sections.title: Part 5: Incomplete Sentences
sections.description: Choose the word that best completes the sentence.

questions.text: The board of directors unanimously _____ the proposed acquisition during yesterday's meeting.
questions.explanation: "Approved" = phê duyệt, hợp lý nhất với "unanimously".

questions.text: The company's market share has been _____ steadily over the past five years.
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc hiện tại tiếp diễn bị động: has been + V-ing.

questions.text: The contract was _____ to a third party without the client's consent.
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc bị động: was + V3 (assigned).

questions.text: We need to _____ the feasibility of expanding into the Asian market.
questions.explanation: Động từ nguyên形 sau "need to".

questions.text: The CEO's resignation came as a _____ to many employees.
questions.explanation: "Came as a surprise" = gây bất ngờ.

questions.text: All employees are required to complete the _____ training program before their first day.
questions.explanation: "Orientation training" = chương trình đào tạo định hướng.

questions.text: The new regulations will have a significant _____ on the way we conduct business.
questions.explanation: "Effect" = tác động (danh từ). "Have an effect on" = có tác động đến.

questions.text: Despite the economic downturn, the company managed to _____ a profit this quarter.
questions.explanation: Động từ nguyên形 sau "managed to".

questions.text: The marketing department has developed an _____ campaign to promote the new product.
questions.explanation: Tính từ "innovative"修饰名词 "campaign".

questions.text: The project was completed _____ schedule and under budget.
questions.explanation: "Ahead of schedule" = trước lịch trình.

questions.text: The company has decided to _____ the manufacturing process to reduce waste.
questions.explanation: "Streamline" = tinh giản.

questions.text: The annual general meeting will be held _____ the last week of March.
questions.explanation: "During" = trong suốt, dùng với khoảng thời gian.

questions.text: The firm has a reputation for providing _____ customer service.
questions.explanation: Tính từ "exceptional"修饰名词 "customer service".

questions.text: The new employee demonstrated a high level of _____ during her first week.
questions.explanation: Danh từ "competence" = năng lực.

questions.text: Please submit your expense reports _____ the end of each month.
questions.explanation: "By the end of" = trước cuối tháng.

questions.text: The acquisition was valued at approximately $450 million, making it the largest deal in the company's _____.
questions.explanation: "In the company's history" = trong lịch sử công ty.

questions.text: The audit revealed several _____ that needed to be addressed immediately.
questions.explanation: "Discrepancies" = sự khác biệt/bất thường.

questions.text: We are looking for candidates who are both _____ and team-oriented.
questions.explanation: "Self-motivated" = tự chủ động (tính từ).

questions.text: The manager's _____ approach to problem-solving has earned her the respect of her peers.
questions.explanation: "Methodical" = có phương pháp, có hệ thống.

questions.text: The results of the feasibility study were _____ with the management team on Friday.
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc bị động: were + V3 (shared).

questions.text: The company plans to _____ its workforce by 15% over the next two years.
questions.explanation: "Downsize" = cắt giảm nhân sự.

questions.text: The proposal was _____ by the committee after a thorough review.
questions.explanation: "Turned down" = bị từ chối.

questions.text: Our competitive _____ is what sets us apart from other firms in the industry.
questions.explanation: "Competitive advantage" = lợi thế cạnh tranh.

questions.text: The firm has implemented a new _____ management system to track employee performance.
questions.explanation: "Talent management" = quản lý nhân tài.

questions.text: All contractors must _____ to the company's code of conduct while on-site.
questions.explanation: "Adhere to" = tuân thủ. Câu đã có "to" nên chọn "adhere".

questions.text: The firm was recognized for its _____ to corporate social responsibility.
questions.explanation: Danh từ "commitment" = cam kết.

questions.text: The company's stock price surged following the _____ of the quarterly earnings report.
questions.explanation: Danh từ "release" = sự phát hành.

questions.text: The new regulations require companies to _____ their carbon emissions by 30% by 2030.
questions.explanation: "Reduce" = giảm. "Carbon emissions" cần được giảm.

questions.text: The board is expected to _____ the appointment at the next meeting.
questions.explanation: "Ratify" = phê chuẩn, hợp lý với bối cảnh hội đồng.

questions.text: The company has seen a _____ increase in online sales since launching the new website.
questions.explanation: Tính từ "substantial" = đáng kể,修饰名词 "increase".

questions.passage:
GLOBAL TECH INDUSTRY REPORT

Cloud Computing Market to Reach $1.2 Trillion by 2028

The global cloud computing market is projected to grow from $591 billion in 2023 to $1.2 trillion by 2028, representing a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 16.2%. The growth is being driven by increasing digital transformation across industries, the expansion of artificial intelligence applications, and the growing adoption of hybrid cloud strategies.

Logistics Costs Expected to Stabilize

After two years of significant volatility, global logistics costs are expected to stabilize in 2024, with ocean freight rates declining 28% from their 2022 peaks. However, air freight rates remain elevated due to limited cargo capacity.

Key trends affecting supply chains:
• Near-shoring is accelerating, with 43% of companies diversifying manufacturing away from single-country dependence
• Automation in warehouses is increasing productivity by 35%
• Last-mile delivery costs have risen 18% due to labor shortages
• Sustainable packaging adoption has grown 42% year-over-year
